HGSS.635.0001:
Um, ’scuse me? I can’t hear you very
well. We must have a bad connection.\f
Try calling again from somewhere else!
HGSS.635.0002:
Hello...
Um, hey, what’s up?\r
I’m doing great over here...totally!\f
HGSS.635.0003:
There are so many Gym Leaders that are
stronger than me... Um, I really need\r
to work harder and improve!
HGSS.635.0004:
I’m often bored Saturdays at noon.
There’s nothing to do...\r
Um... So, call me Saturday, OK?
HGSS.635.0005:
Yeah, I’m bored! Nothing to do!
Oh, yeah!\r
You wanna battle me again? [0200,0000]
HGSS.635.0006:
For sure! I really want to battle, too.\f
Um, you know where to find me...
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.
HGSS.635.0008:
Um, really?
You really have time to battle me?\f
Don’t break a promise you made to
someone else--that’s not fair!
HGSS.635.0009:
I’m waiting at the Fighting Dojo in
Saffron City.\r
Broken promises are unforgivable,\r
get me?
HGSS.635.0010:
Um, this is Whitney.
How are you?\f
HGSS.635.0011:
Don’t forget you promised to meet me at
the Fighting Dojo in Saffron City.\r
You’re not gonna make me wait, are you?
HGSS.635.0012:
Um, have you ever been to the
Moomoo Farm off Route 39?\f
My Milky...
Um, I mean, my MILTANK, is staying over\r
there now...
HGSS.635.0013:
Um, I’ve gotta tell you, I’m so
hungry... Do you know how it feels?\f
I’m not an overeater or anything! This
is completely normal for my age!
HGSS.635.0014:
The coolest member of the Elite Four?
Umm... I’d have to say...\r
Bruno?\f
I’m not the only one. Everyone says the
same thing, seriously.\r
He looks like quite a guy...
